3.4.
In vitro cytotoxic and antileishmanial activity of PLGA, Trs and Trp
NPs
Blank and loaded PLGA and SLNs NPs were not cytotoxic to any of
the cell lines tested, as well as for any of the NPs, regardless of whether
they were loaded or not with C6I.
In all conditions, the cytotoxic doses were higher than 200 μg/mL
(LC50). In contrast, free C6I was cytotoxic to fibroblast (Detroit cells),
monocyte-derived macrophages, and U937 cells at doses lower than 100
μg/mL (Table 7). The antileishmanial activity (EC50) increased when
